idea: Weekly surge in Google Trends for 'DIY plumbing repair' signals consumer stress rebound
behavior: An uptick in DIY plumbing repair searches indicates rising household maintenance stress, often preceding increased discretionary spending on home goods.

market_impact.rationale: Consumer discretionary benefits as stressed consumers invest in home repairs and upgrades.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long XLY if weekly Google Trends index for 'DIY plumbing repair' rises 15% week-over-week
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 3 weeks or if index drops 10% week-over-week

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Weekly search interest for home repair topics fluctuates regularly with seasonal and stress-driven spikes.

idea: Daily jump in freight rail carload volumes signals industrial rebound

data.source: Freight rail carload volume daily reports

behavior: Sudden daily increases in rail carloads indicate inventory restocking and industrial activity acceleration.

market_impact.rationale: Industrial sector benefits from increased freight throughput signaling production growth.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long XLI if daily rail carloads increase by more than 3% versus prior day
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 7 trading days or if daily volume drops by 2% for 2 consecutive days

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Daily freight volumes regularly fluctuate with economic cycles and supply chain shifts.

idea: Weekly Google Trends surge in 'energy bill shock' signals consumer stress impacting utilities
behavior: Rising searches for energy bill shock point to consumer cost pressure that can depress discretionary spending but support utilities demand.

market_impact.rationale: Utilities sector typically benefits as consumers prioritize essential services amid stress.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long XLU if weekly search interest for 'energy bill shock' rises 20% week-over-week
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 4 weeks or if search interest declines by 15% week-over-week

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Energy cost concerns ebb and flow seasonally and with price volatility, causing repeated search spikes.

idea: Daily spike in political insider filings for financial sector executives signals volatility
behavior: Sudden increase in insider selling or buying among financial sector executives often precedes short-term sector volatility.

market_impact.rationale: Insider selling spikes can signal expected headwinds or risk in financials.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLF if daily insider filings for financial execs increase by 30% over 5-day average with net selling >50%
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 7 trading days or if insider buying overtakes selling

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Political insider activity fluctuates frequently with market conditions and regulatory news.

idea: Weekly surge in Google Trends for 'warehouse worker strike' signals freight logistics disruption
behavior: Rising search interest in warehouse strikes signals imminent labor disruptions affecting freight flow.

market_impact.rationale: Industrial sector faces headwinds from labor disruptions in key logistics hubs.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLI if weekly Google Trends searches for 'warehouse worker strike' rise 25% week-over-week
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 3 weeks or if search interest drops below prior week

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Labor unrest topics spike repeatedly during contract talks and economic stress periods.

idea: Daily spike in earthquake activity near key California ports signals supply chain risk
behavior: Increased seismic activity near major ports increases risk perceptions of supply chain interruptions.

market_impact.rationale: Industrial sector sensitive to shipping and logistic disruptions.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLI if daily earthquake counts near California ports rise by 50% above 30-day average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 5 trading days or if activity normalizes below 10-day average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Seismic activity clusters often last several days or weeks, triggering repeated alerts.

idea: Weekly Google Trends spike for 'summer travel cancellations' signals travel sector weakness
behavior: Rising cancellations interest signals consumer hesitation or disruptions affecting travel demand.

market_impact.rationale: Consumer discretionary travel and leisure sub-sectors suffer from cancellations.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLY if weekly searches for 'summer travel cancellations' rise 30% week-over-week
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 4 weeks or if search interest drops below 10% weekly increase

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Travel cancellation concerns increase seasonally and with event risk news.

idea: Daily surge in EV charger installations signals accelerating EV adoption
behavior: Rapid daily growth in EV charger installations signals increasing EV infrastructure buildout and demand.

market_impact.rationale: Communication and tech sectors benefit from EV ecosystem growth and associated infrastructure.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long XLC if daily EV charger count rises 1.5% above 7-day moving average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 10 trading days or if daily installs fall below 7-day average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: EV charger installation rates often see bursts with government incentives and private rollout phases.

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Labor contract negotiations news often intensifies and fades repeatedly during negotiation windows.
